# Daily Report — 2026-05-13

## Task Completed
Added `download_attachment` tool — retrieves the binary content of a ServiceNow
attachment via `GET /api/now/attachment/{sys_id}/file` and returns it as
base64-encoded data together with the server-reported `content_type`.

- New `DownloadAttachmentParams` Pydantic model (single required field: `sys_id`)
- `download_attachment()` function in `attachment_tools.py`; handles 404 guard,
  HTTP errors, and network exceptions; falls back to `application/octet-stream`
  when the server omits a `Content-Type` header
- Registered in `__init__.py` (`__all__`), `tool_utils.py` (tool definition),
  and `tool_packages.yaml` (system_administrator + full packages)
- Also added the missing `upload_attachment` registration to `tool_utils.py`

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1037
- Coverage: 91%
- attachment_tools.py coverage: 99%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Clean — no vulnerabilities flagged by ruff or pip-audit
